creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
(In reply to sean.greven from comment #1)

Actually my whole motivation for bringing the port up to 2.6 is to be able to use it with pf. ;-)

But I haven't tested this currently. It seems not to break the ipfw stuff and I wanted to give pf a shot after the port is upgraded. According to the fwknop people it should work.
